title: Top Headlines of 2014
description: The article is a list of significant events that occurred in 2014, including the legalization of recreational marijuana in Colorado, the disappearance of Malaysia Airlines Flight 370, the kidnapping of schoolgirls by Boko Haram in Nigeria, and the restoration of diplomatic relations between the United States and Cuba.
